web.title: How to document GraphQL with Swagger \ OpenAPI?
web.description: You can do this yourself and go to graphql.org/swapi-graphql and click the "docs" link on the right side. This just works out of the box, completely for free.

web.title: Is there an equivalent to OpenApi / Swagger UI for ...
web.description: I know GraphQL can communicate its schema to clients interactively, but I would still think there is some way to export an API specification.

web.title: Moving existing API from REST to GraphQL
web.description: Swagger2graphQL accepts your Swagger schema and returns GraphQL schema, where resolvers automatically make HTTP requests to existing REST ...

web.title: Swagger, gRPC or GraphQL? - Questions / Help - Elixir Forum
web.description: GraphQL is great solution, especially if you manage to make it “flat” and not too much of a nested / looped graph but it's not being universally loved.

web.title: Comparing OpenAPI / Swagger, GraphQL, and gRPC
web.description: A talk at Twin Cities Code Camp 2020 which will compare and contrast the more common and traditional OpenAPI or Swagger APIs.
